subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-05-18
subcodes.first_line: I have sent for thee this morning to speak to thee on a confidential matter. The covenant-breakers have again concocted another device, whereby they may terminate my life
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God
